name: CISO Hub Metrics (Risk Posture, Compliance, Incidents)
description: Enterprise-tier customer-facing security posture dashboard: risk score, compliance status, incident register, CVE exposure, and a PDF board report.

frontend.evidence: FIXED 2026-07-09. workers/src/index.js:4338-4351 (GET /api/ciso/metrics) was gated behind requireCan(authCtx, env, 'admin:business:read') (workers/src/auth/rbac.js:101, isSuperAdmin-only), excluding every paying customer. Aligned to the same tier-inclusive bar the sibling /api/executive/ prefix route already used in production (workers/src/index.js ~7766): ['PRO','ENTERPRISE','MSSP'].includes(tier) OR requireCan(..., 'admin:analytics:read') (isPlatformAdmin, workers/src/auth/rbac.js:100). frontend/user-dashboard.html:2251-2265's loadCisoMetrics() was already correctly built (correct endpoint, correct envelope unwrap) — no frontend change was needed; the defect was purely the server-side gate. Regression-locked by workers/test/cisoExecutiveDashboardTierGate.test.mjs (10 tests: real PRO/ENTERPRISE tier admitted, FREE tier and anonymous still rejected 403, ADMIN_KEY bypass still admitted) — full suite 188 files/2012 tests green post-fix.

navigation.evidence: frontend/user-dashboard.html:852 sidebar nav-item (data-page="ciso") reaches this page; frontend/index.html:19986-19991 also surfaces a homepage 'Executive Hub' widget that fetches the same endpoint.

test_coverage.evidence: workers/test/cisoExecutiveDashboardTierGate.test.mjs (new, 2026-07-09) imports and exercises worker.fetch against GET /api/ciso/metrics directly, asserting PRO/ENTERPRISE tier admission and FREE/anonymous rejection via a real api_keys-row DB mock — the exact scenario that was previously untested and broken.

verification.evidence: Fix verified at three layers: (1) source read of the corrected gate against the already-proven sibling pattern; (2) workers/test/cisoExecutiveDashboardTierGate.test.mjs — real PRO/ENTERPRISE tier requests reach the handler and get 200, FREE/anonymous still get 403, full pre-existing suite (188 files/2012 tests) stays green; (3) a Playwright click-through of the real frontend/user-dashboard.html against contract-accurate mocked responses (shape verified against handleGetCISOMetrics source) confirmed the pre-existing frontend call/render logic. NOT YET verified against the live deployed Cloudflare Worker + D1 (no deploy access from this session) — customer_journey_complete stays false until a post-merge production smoke-test confirms a real PRO-tier account sees non-zero CISO data end-to-end.

notes: Fix applied 2026-07-09 exactly as recommended in the prior pass's notes: gated /api/ciso/metrics the same way the /api/executive/ prefix route gates itself. The other CISO routes (posture/incidents/compliance-status/risk-register/report/export-pdf) were left untouched — they already have no permission check (open to any authenticated user) and were not reported as broken.

name: Executive Hub / Command Center
description: Platform-wide MRR/ARR/paying-customer KPIs and a richer FAIR-risk/board-report Executive Command Center, for Enterprise-tier customers and platform admins.

frontend.evidence: FIXED 2026-07-09. The exact-match GET /api/executive/dashboard route (workers/src/index.js:5993-6004, registered before the prefix-dispatched /api/executive/ block at ~7766) was gated by the same SUPERADMIN-only requireCan(authCtx, env, 'admin:business:read') documented as broken in CAP-DASH-001. Aligned to the identical tier-inclusive pattern already proven in production by its own sibling prefix block: ['PRO','ENTERPRISE','MSSP'].includes(tier) OR requireCan(..., 'admin:analytics:read'). cdbExecLoad() (frontend/index.html ~19986-19991) needed no change — it already called the right endpoint. Regression-locked by workers/test/cisoExecutiveDashboardTierGate.test.mjs (same file covers both CAP-DASH-001 and CAP-DASH-002, 10 tests total).

navigation.evidence: Embedded in frontend/index.html's homepage; cdbExecLoad() is the trigger function for this widget.

test_coverage.evidence: workers/test/cisoExecutiveDashboardTierGate.test.mjs (new, 2026-07-09) now directly exercises GET /api/executive/dashboard (the exact-match route this widget actually calls, previously untested — workers/test/executiveCommandCenterGate.test.mjs only ever covered the separate prefix-dispatched block). Real PRO/ENTERPRISE tier admission and FREE/anonymous rejection both asserted.

verification.evidence: Same three-layer verification as CAP-DASH-001 (source read, new regression test, Playwright click-through against contract-accurate mocks). NOT YET verified against live deployed production — customer_journey_complete stays false pending a post-merge smoke test.

notes: Fixed together with CAP-DASH-001 in the same change, exactly as recommended: aligned /api/executive/dashboard's gate with its own sibling /api/executive/ prefix route's tier-inclusive pattern.

name: Product & Growth Analytics (Funnel, Feature Adoption)
description: Internal growth-metrics API: conversion funnel, feature-adoption tracking, and event ingestion for product analytics.

frontend.evidence: FIXED 2026-07-15 (PR #251, commit 3f749cf): frontend/growth-analytics.js added, with real fetch() calls to /api/analytics/p3/growth, /api/analytics/p3/funnel, /api/analytics/p3/adoption (confirmed by direct read). Loaded via a <script defer> tag at frontend/index.html:24085. Renders into the existing #growth-analytics section, frontend/index.html:5240, reachable via the 'Growth' owner nav tab, frontend/index.html:1301,20621 — owner-only by design (data-auth-gate="owner"), matching this capability's own admin:analytics:read RBAC gate, not a customer-facing surface.

navigation.evidence: FIXED 2026-07-15: real 'Growth' nav tab, frontend/index.html:20621, reveals the section via JS for confirmed owners; hidden (display:none) for everyone else by design, matching the RBAC gate below.

test_coverage.evidence: No test file imports workers/src/handlers/productAnalytics.js directly.

verification.evidence: workers/src/handlers/productAnalytics.js exports enumerated; workers/src/index.js:3165-3195 route registrations and gate read directly; frontend/growth-analytics.js and its inclusion in frontend/index.html read directly and re-confirmed independently (not just registry-trusted).

notes: Documentation-drift correction (2026-07-15): this entry previously described a backend-only orphan (last_verified 2026-07-08); PR #251 (same day as that verification, but landed after it) wired a real owner-facing frontend. priority corrected P2→P6 (frontend no longer missing) and operational_status NOT READY→PILOT ONLY (no test coverage yet is the remaining gap, not missing UI). The dashboard/role-personalization gap tracked by docs/SAAS_PRODUCTIZATION_MISSION_BRIEF.md's Domain 6 is registered once, under docs/capability-registry/domains/rbac.json's CAP-RBAC-002, and not duplicated here.
